meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheim was born in 1470, in Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany as the son of Hans von Darmsheim. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1524, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheimは1470年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンダルムシェイムでHans von Darmsheimの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1524年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Würt: 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐 더셰임
ko.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheim(은)는 1470년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐 더셰임에서 Hans von Darmsheim의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1524년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.
